intent: 落地 W3-A 退 Ink:删 ink+react、install wizard(install-v2 + 10 个 tui/*.tsx + InkOutputRenderer.ts)重写为 @clack/prompts,功能等价 + parity 绿。依据 grill GRL-20260623 context-package(R-001/C-001/C-003/C-007),scope 已清直接 plan→execute 单 PR

classification_rationale.matched_pattern: plan→execute single-PR lifecycle (scope pre-locked by grill GRL-20260623)
excluded_alternatives: brainstorm-driven — exploration done in grill; no open ideation needed
full-lifecycle / quality-loop — user scoped to single PR (plan→execute), parity gate folded into execute acceptance (C-007) + post-goal-audit
quick — too broad (10 tsx + deps removal + parity), needs plan decomposition
classification_rationale.decompose_clarification_source: grill GRL-20260623 context-package — Scope/Constraints/Definition-of-Done already locked (10 constraints + R6 reversal); not re-asked per durable clarification
classification_rationale.w3a_scope_note: W3-A = R-001 + C-001 + C-003(HUD layering) + C-007(acceptance). Aesthetic constraints C-002/C-004/C-005/C-006/C-008 belong to W3-B → out_of_scope

steps.args: --dir .workflow/scratch/20260623-grill-cli-stack-aesthetic "W3-A 退 Ink:install wizard 重写为 @clack/prompts + theme.ts,删 ink+react"

steps.completion_evidence: W3-A acceptance: 14/14 gates PASS; 1118 tests + theme-parity green; all sub-goals confirmed

in_scope: 删除 ink + react (+ 任何 ink-* / react-* 仅服务 install wizard 的) 依赖,自 packages/cli/package.json
重写 install wizard:install-v2.ts + 10 个 tui/*.tsx + InkOutputRenderer.ts → @clack/prompts(交互)+ theme.ts(输出)双底座
功能等价:install wizard 交互流程、产物、文案与现行一致
parity test 绿 + 现有 install-v2 测试(dry-run/hooks-stage/pipeline/guidance-dedupe/preflight)全过
本地 tsc --noEmit 通过(防 CI 复发)
单 PR(分支 feat/w3a-ink-exit,增量 commit)
out_of_scope: W3-B 焕然一新全面 theme 换皮(独立 PR,R-002)
C-005 colors.ts → theme.ts 单一色彩真源迁移 + 删 picocolors(W3-B)
C-002 结构基元 tree/grid/badge 视觉重设计(W3-B)
C-004 truecolor/none 二档 + ASCII fallback 体系建设(W3-B,W3-A 仅保留现有行为)
C-006 @clack 包上下文主题化(intro/outro/log theme 化)(W3-B)
C-008 per-surface output snapshot test 体系(W3-B)
渐变 / 背景色 / 256·16 色降级阶梯(non-goals,永久禁)
fork 或深度 restyle @clack 控件(non-goals)
为退 Ink 设 perf 硬验收线(C-007:perf 量一次存档,非硬线)
复杂实时全屏 dashboard / 翻 D1 退 Ink 主决策(R6:仅当未来确需全屏 dashboard 才作隔离 CLI-only 面局部引 Ink)
boundary_contract.source: grill GRL-20260623 context-package.json (R-001, C-001, C-003, C-007, non_goals, R6)

execution_criteria: packages/cli/package.json 不再含 ink / react / ink-* 依赖;grep 全仓无 install wizard 路径的 import 'ink' / from 'react'
install wizard 经 @clack/prompts 渲染交互、theme.ts 渲染输出,行为与现行等价
parity test 绿;现有 install-v2 测试套件全过;无 skip / ts-ignore 掩盖
本地 pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit 通过
10 个 tui/*.tsx + InkOutputRenderer.ts 删除或重写为非 Ink 实现,无悬挂引用
改动收敛在单 PR(feat/w3a-ink-exit),增量 commit,中文提交信息

task_decomposition.goal: 盘点 install wizard 的 Ink 渲染面:install-v2.ts 调用链、10 个 tui/*.tsx 组件职责、InkOutputRenderer.ts 用途、与 theme.ts/@clack 现有用法的衔接点
task_decomposition.done_when: plan artifact 列出每个 tsx 的职责 + 对应 @clack/theme.ts 替换映射 + 删除/重写清单 + 测试影响面

task_decomposition.goal: 用 @clack/prompts(交互控件)+ theme.ts(输出渲染)重写 install wizard,功能等价
task_decomposition.done_when: install wizard 交互流程/产物/文案与现行一致,手动或测试可验证等价
task_decomposition.evidence: 重写后的 install-v2.ts + 非 Ink 组件;install-v2 测试套件绿

task_decomposition.goal: 删除 ink+react+ink-* 依赖,清理全部 Ink import,删除/替换 10 tsx + InkOutputRenderer.ts
task_decomposition.done_when: package.json 无 ink/react;grep 无悬挂 Ink 引用;tsc --noEmit 通过
task_decomposition.evidence: git diff package.json + grep 结果 + tsc --noEmit 输出

task_decomposition.goal: parity 绿 + 全测试通过 + 单 PR 收口
task_decomposition.done_when: parity test + install-v2 测试全过,tsc --noEmit 通过,改动收敛单 PR 并增量 commit
task_decomposition.evidence: 测试输出 + git log on feat/w3a-ink-exit
